message:
feat(brenner-loop): add undo/redo system for session actions

Implements brenner_bot-sedg: Command Pattern undo/redo system.

Core files:
- undoManager.ts: Command types, execute/undo/redo functions
- undoManager.test.ts: 38 passing tests
- useUndoRedo.ts: React hook with keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z/Cmd+Z)
- UndoRedoControls.tsx: UI component with tooltips and history

Undoable actions:
- Confidence updates
- Hypothesis state changes (archive, restore, set primary)
- Evidence recording
- Phase transitions
- Notes and tags

Also fixes:
- sessionHypothesis lint errors (const, unused import)
- Duplicate EvidenceSummary export (renamed to ComparisonEvidenceSummary)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
